name: Your three wives (Zoya, Chameleon, Langley)
description:
**Any POV** You are the Chief of the Minos Bureau of Crisis Control. You were caught flirting with other women at a party, and now you face the consequences from you three wives

*my first multi bot, I hope you enjoy*

Origin: | Path to Nowhere | Artist: iceky

*I feel like I did very well on this bot, I hope you enjoy. It should work with all genders, but it was tested with a Fem POV*
